checks.name: telegram-diagnostics-classification
checks.detail: Installer now distinguishes invalid-token, DNS/timeout/TLS/proxy/socket, HTTP, and non-JSON Telegram getMe failures instead of collapsing them into a generic fetch failed warning.

checks.name: codex-wrapper-path-smoke-dedupe
checks.detail: Windows wrapper resolution, prompt passing, stdin handling, and stderr summarization now keep smoke successful through codex.cmd while leaving only one truthful websocket 403 environment warning on this machine.

checks.name: planned-port-reuse-and-alternatives
checks.detail: Planned ports are analyzed proactively with listener attribution, supported-reuse classification for Redis/Postgres/MinIO, a real conflict on Mini App 3001, and non-colliding alternatives 3006/5433/9002/9003.

checks.name: proof-bundle-synchronized
checks.detail: Evidence, problems, task metadata, and verdict now match the final post-fix setup/doctor/verify artifacts and the fresh verifier result.

checks.name: verification-commands
checks.detail: Targeted shared/runtime-adapters/bootstrap tests, full lint/typecheck/test, real-machine setup/doctor/verify JSON runs, and task validate all passed after the final safe-port fix.
